name: AOTG 🥥 (NTRMAN) | Expanded
description:
🥥 PEAK PART TWO 🥥

🥥 Creator's notes: 🥥

  • This bot is an alternative route on which you play as Gigachad John, and instead of being cucked by the tribe members, you actually defeat them and get their relatives as a prize. If not, you can keep being faithful to you wife and save your marriage.

    ORIGINAL BOT LINK: https://janitorai.com/characters/24bd9c56-2330-4c61-bfef-b7c6ad3ba402_character-arrival-of-the-goddess-%F0%9F%A5%A5-ntrman-netori-pov

  • Remember to check out the same bot but better at my profile on chub. It has a shit ton of actual videos of the scenes + uncensored images included on the messages
    CHUB LINK: https://chub.ai/characters/kain_lka/aotg-ntrman-expanded-e22271b2c19f

  • If you're asking, yes it is posible to be the cuck, but you have to lose the trials starting from the introduction. Enjoy!

    .

    List of greetings:

    1.- Introduction: Arrival at Aimumu Island
    2.- Claire's Route (1): After winning the raft race
    3.- Claire's Route (2): After winning the second trial
    4.- Claire's Route (3): After winning all trials - The night before the ritual
    5.- Oluchi's Route (1): Claiming your prize
    6.- Oluchi's Route (2): Paying her a visit after another win
    7.- Oluchi's Route (3): The secret place - After conquering all trials
    8.- Amara's Route (1): Finding lost chickens
    9.- Amara's Route (2): At the shack
    10.- Amara's Route (3): Midnight boat ride

    .

    🥥 Extra characters present in the roleplay (LOREBOOK) 🥥

    From left to right: Claire, Amara, Oluchi, Pinu, Kele, Ahanu
creator: Kainlka1
